headline: Eli Lilly Stock And The Price Of Confidence

headline: Going Deeper On Disc Medicine
summary: Disc Medicine stock is slightly compelling, trading at ~$2.1 billion net of cash, with significant upside tied to bitopertin and DISC-0974 clinical milestones. Read the full analysis here.
